title: Magical Birthday Unicorn Foil Balloon, 18 Inch, Pastel Rainbow Design
features: DESIGN: Beautiful pastel rainbow-themed foil balloon featuring a magical unicorn design with sparkling stars and whimsical text
SIZE: Measures 45.7 centimetres (18 inches) in diameter, perfect for birthday party decorations and displays
MATERIAL: Premium quality foil construction ensures excellent floating time and maintains shape throughout celebrations
VERSATILITY: Suitable for helium inflation or air-filling, can be mounted on walls or suspended from ceiling for magical party atmosphere
SPECIAL MESSAGE: Features 'Have a Magical Birthday' text in elegant purple lettering, complemented by enchanting unicorn artwork
description: Product description Add a touch of enchantment to your celebration with this stunning 18-inch foil balloon featuring a charming unicorn design. The balloon showcases a beautiful pastel rainbow colour scheme with a dreamy unicorn illustration adorned with flowing golden and pastel-coloured mane. Set against a magical background filled with twinkling stars, the balloon displays the message 'Have a Magical Birthday' in elegant purple lettering. Perfect for birthday parties, this balloon creates a whimsical atmosphere that will delight guests of all ages. The high-quality foil material ensures the balloon maintains its shape and shine throughout your celebration. The 45.7-centimetre size makes it an eye-catching centrepiece for any party setup, whether floating freely or as part of a larger balloon arrangement. Create unforgettable birthday memories with this enchanting unicorn-themed balloon that brings fantasy and fun to any celebration. Safety Warning not suitable for children under the age of 3
